description.old: Deal 6 damage to [gold]ALL [/gold]enemies. If the last card you played this turn was a [gold]Skill[/gold], apply 1 [gold]Weak [/gold]to [gold]ALL [/gold]enemies.
description.new: Deal 7 damage. If you have 5 or more other cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold], hits an additional time.

descriptionUpgraded.old: Deal 8 damage to [gold]ALL [/gold]enemies. If the last card you played this turn was a [gold]Skill[/gold], apply 2 [gold]Weak [/gold]to [gold]ALL [/gold]enemies.
descriptionUpgraded.new: Deal 9 damage. If you have 5 or more other cards in your [gold]Hand[/gold], hits an additional time.

description.old: Deal 8 damage. Deals 4 additional damage for each card discarded this turn.
description.new: Deal 9 damage. Deals 4 additional damage for each card discarded this turn.

descriptionUpgraded.old: Deal 10 damage. Deals 4 additional damage for each card discarded this turn.
descriptionUpgraded.new: Deal 11 damage. Deals 4 additional damage for each card discarded this turn.

description.old: Whenever you draw a card during your turn, deal 1 damage to ALL enemies.
description.new: Whenever you draw a card during your turn, deal 2 damage to ALL enemies.

descriptionUpgraded.old: Whenever you draw a card during your turn, deal 2 damage to ALL enemies.
descriptionUpgraded.new: [gold]Innate\n[/gold]. Whenever you draw a card during your turn, deal 2 damage to ALL enemies.
